name: Daiquiri (frozen)
description: A slushy frozen daiquiri made with BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, fresh lime juice, sugar, and crushed ice. If you ever imagine yourself sitting seaside under the sun without a worry in the world, chances are you have a Frozen Daiquiri in hand. It’s luscious richness satisfies a craving for something sweet yet a little tart.
recipe_steps: Combine all the ingredients in a blender.
Add 3/4 cup of crushed ice and blend until a slushy consistency forms.
searchable_text: Daiquiri (frozen) main rum BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum A slushy frozen daiquiri made with BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, fresh lime juice, sugar, and crushed ice. If you ever imagine yourself sitting seaside under the sun without a worry in the world, chances are you have a Frozen Daiquiri in hand. It’s luscious richness satisfies a craving for something sweet yet a little tart. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, 25 ml fresh lime juice, 3 tsp extra fine sugar, 3/4 cup(s) crushed ice, as garnish lime wheel recipe steps Combine all the ingredients in a blender. Add 3/4 cup of crushed ice and blend until a slushy consistency forms. Serve in a cocktail glass. Garnish with a lime wheel.
